description: Triggered when the user wants to audit a website for SEO, performance, security, accessibility, broken links, or general health using the squirrelscan CLI.
should_trigger: Run a website health check on our landing page
Check https://example.com for broken links and meta tag issues
Do a full performance and accessibility audit of our site
Run squirrel audit on our e-commerce store
What's the health score of https://myblog.com?
should_not_trigger: Analyze competitor content strategy for keyword gaps
Check my Next.js code for TypeScript errors
Review my React component for accessibility issues in the code
How do I improve my Core Web Vitals in code?
